stepResults.stepName: UC2 · Authenticate — POST /auth → Extract authToken (Chaining Source)
UC3 · Create Booking — POST /booking with Dynamic Data → Extract bookingId
UC5 · Performance Gate — GET /booking list <3s soft warn <10s hard fail
UC7 · Retry Policy Demo — GET /booking/999999 (not found) → retries=2 → fail
UC4 · Get Booking — GET /booking/{{bookingId}} → Verify Chaining + Capture Baseline
UC6 · Update Booking — PUT /booking/{{bookingId}} using {{authToken}} Cookie
UC8 · Delete Booking (Teardown) — DELETE /booking/{{bookingId}} → Cleanup after all steps
